documents.text: Database connection pool exhaustion occurs when all available connections are in use and no new connections can be created.
Memory leaks in web applications occur when objects are allocated in memory but never released.
API gateway 503 errors indicate the service is temporarily unavailable due to backend failures or resource exhaustion.
Authentication service latency spikes can be caused by database query degradation or increased user load.
SMTP credential expiration causes email notification failures. Rotate credentials before expiry.
Disk space exhaustion causes service failures when log files fill available storage. Implement log rotation.
S3 bucket permission errors occur when IAM policies are modified without updating dependent services.
Network timeout incidents are caused by misconfigured timeout values or downstream service degradation.
CPU throttling occurs when a service exceeds its allocated CPU quota causing increased response times.
SSL certificate expiration causes all HTTPS connections to fail. Monitor expiry with 30 days warning.
